description_long: This object is a stylized representation of an AK-pattern assault rifle, featuring a two-tone color scheme with a red-orange stock, pistol grip, and handguard, and a yellow-orange receiver, barrel, and magazine. The rifle has a fixed stock and a prominent curved magazine, typical of AK-style rifles. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple front sight post and a basic muzzle device. The receiver includes a top-mounted rail, and the trigger guard and trigger are clearly defined. The overall form is blocky and simplified, with minimal surface detailing, giving it a toy-like or training prop appearance. The surface appears matte and hard, likely made from plastic or a lightweight composite.
description: A stylized, two-tone AK-style rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and matte plastic finish. The design is simplified and blocky, resembling a toy or prop.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the fixed stock, curved magazine, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel and front sight post, with the stock and receiver mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same features visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the rest of the rifle receding from view.
